risks.description: Negative impact on biodiversity and ecosystems due to GHG emissions from raw material extraction, production, and transportation.
Landfill or incineration of non-recyclable blade materials increases resource outflow and environmental impact.
mitigation: Offering blade circularity solutions improves value proposition

risks.risk_title: Resource inflow risks in upstream supply chain
risks.description: Climate and environmental impacts from extraction/production of metals and raw materials.
